Dashboard.collectionsDescription: Organize and group your skills by project or topic to manage workflows more effectively.
Dashboard.collectionAddHint: Group skills by project or workflow theme.
Dashboard.collectionSlugHint: Used by MCP. Use lowercase unaccented letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores only. No spaces or special characters.
Dashboard.collectionDuplicateError: Collection name or collection key already exists.
Dashboard.collectionDefaultDescription: Group skills by project or workflow theme.
Dashboard.collectionKeyWarning: The collection key is used by MCP workflows. Changing it can break agents or workflows that still call the old key.
Dashboard.collectionSaveFailed: Could not save the collection. Check whether the key is duplicated or invalid.
Dashboard.collectionPlatformDescription: Ready-made, read-only workflows you can add to your library.
Dashboard.collectionPersonalDescription: Collections you own and can create, edit, reorder, or delete.
Dashboard.collectionEmptyPlatform: No platform collection has been added. Open the skill marketplace and add one to use it here.
Dashboard.collectionEmptyPersonal: You have not created a personal collection yet.
